# Local SEO Wiser

> Local SEO Wiser is a Pittsburgh, PA digital marketing agency focused on Local SEO, Google Business Profile and Maps visibility, websites, paid search, and related digital marketing services for local businesses.

Canonical site: https://localseowiser.com

## Core Services

- [Local SEO](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo): Local search visibility for Pittsburgh-area and nationwide clients
- [Google Map Optimization](https://localseowiser.com/google-map-optimization): Google Business Profile and Maps listing optimization
- [Technical SEO](https://localseowiser.com/technical-seo): Crawlability, site health, and technical SEO improvements
- [SEO for Small Business](https://localseowiser.com/seo-for-small-business): Focused SEO for growing local brands
- [Link Building](https://localseowiser.com/link-building): Link acquisition support for SEO campaigns
- [Local Business Citations](https://localseowiser.com/local-business-citation): Local citation and NAP consistency work
- [Landing Page Optimization](https://localseowiser.com/landing-page-optimization): Landing pages built to convert search traffic
- [Web Design](https://localseowiser.com/web-design): Website design for local businesses
- [WordPress Development](https://localseowiser.com/wordpress-development): Custom WordPress websites
- [Shopify Development](https://localseowiser.com/shopify-development): Shopify storefront development
- [Google Ads](https://localseowiser.com/google-ads): Google Ads management for local lead generation
- [PPC Advertising](https://localseowiser.com/ppc-advertising): Pay-per-click campaign management
- [Content Writing](https://localseowiser.com/content-writing): SEO-focused content writing
- [Social Media Marketing](https://localseowiser.com/social-media-marketing): Social media marketing services
- [Social Media Management](https://localseowiser.com/social-media-management): Ongoing social media management

Also see the full services overview: [Services](https://localseowiser.com/services)

## Service Areas

- [Areas we serve](https://localseowiser.com/areas): Pittsburgh metro Local SEO locations hub
- [Local SEO Cranberry Township](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-cranberry-township)
- [Local SEO Lawrenceville](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-lawrenceville)
- [Local SEO Monroeville](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-monroeville)
- [Local SEO Mt. Lebanon](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-mt-lebanon)
- [Local SEO North Hills](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-north-hills)
- [Local SEO North Shore](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-north-shore)
- [Local SEO Oakland](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-oakland)
- [Local SEO Robinson Township](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-robinson-township)
- [Local SEO Shadyside](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-shadyside)
- [Local SEO South Hills](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-south-hills)
- [Local SEO South Side](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-south-side)
- [Local SEO Squirrel Hill](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-squirrel-hill)
- [Local SEO Strip District](https://localseowiser.com/local-seo-strip-district)
